pkgmetadata.longdescription: PVAccess for PythonPython bindings for the PVAccess network client and server. python -m virtualenv p4ptest . p4ptestbinactivate python -m pip install -U pip python -m pip install p4p python -m nose2 p4pSee documentationhttpsmdavidsaver.github.iop4pSourcehttpsgithub.commdavidsaverp4pCI results[Github Actions](httpsgithub.commdavidsaverp4pworkflowsP4Pbadge.svg)
